channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: North Korea’s hijack of one of the web’s most used open source projects was likely weeks in the making
item.description: North Korean hackers pushed out malicious updates to a popular open source project by hacking a top developer's computer in a long-running campaign.

item.title: Skip Target: Walmart's spring patio sale is better than I expected — here's everything I'm adding to my cart
item.description: I'm so impressed with Walmart's spring sale that I'm sharing everything I'm adding to my cart, including patio furniture, planters, grills, and more.

item.title: Scientists Are Recycling Centuries-Old Bullets for a Badly Needed Toxic Compound
item.description: Researchers want to recycle more lead waste for high-tech solar panels via a new method.

item.title: Hisense just launched the CanvasTV in a 50-inch size
item.description: Shop the new 50-inch Hisense CanvasTV at Amazon for $1,299.99.

item.title: Claude is having some problems – here's everything we know as Anthropic confirms 'elevated errors'
item.description: Claude's identified an issue

item.title: Need a new smartwatch? The Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 is on sale and selling fast
item.description: As of April 6, you can get the Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 for $289.99 at Amazon, down from $349.99.

item.title: Going viral from space: NASAs tech-savvy Artemis II crew
item.description: NASA's Artemis II crew is going viral in space thanks to iPhone selfies, Instagram Reels, and a "Full House"-inspired video.

item.title: How to watch the Artemis II moon flyby live
item.description: It's Artemis II moon flyby day. Here's how to watch the flyby live and witness history being made.

item.title: SparkCat malware returns to target Android and iOS users, hiding in innocent apps to try and steal your details
item.description: The malware primarily targets crypto users in Japan, Korea, and China.

item.title: The Sony WH-1000XM5 headphones are $5 away from their lowest price ever
item.description: As of April 6, the Sony WH-1000XM6 headphones are on sale for $248 at Amazon, putting them just $5 away from their record-low price of $243, and slashing $151.99 off their price overall.

item.title: Artemis II astronauts took these selfies of Earth with an iPhone 17
item.description: NASA's Artemis II crew brought iPhone 17s onboard to document their journey. See the first images they just sent back.

item.title: Samsung’s Galaxy S27 ‘Pro’ could squeeze in between the Ultra and Plus phones
item.description: Samsung's S27 lineup, expected next year, might include a new member, the Galaxy S27 Pro, which would be a second premium option between Samsung's Ultra and Plus models, as first reported by ETNews. The new Pro model reportedly won't support the S Pen but will feature Samsung's Privacy Display, which is currently only available on […]

item.title: You Can Buy ‘Dune: Part Three’ IMAX Tickets Right Now
item.description: 'Dune: Part Three' is really stepping out over 'Avengers: Doomsday' by selling select tickets eight months early.

item.title: What is the release date for Invincible season 4 episode 6 on Prime Video?
item.description: Here's when you'll be able to watch the sixth episode of Invincible's fourth season on Prime Video.

item.title: Battlefield 6 audio team says they 'constantly polish what we think needs polishing'
item.description: The Battlefield 6 audio team has discussed its work with the game's live service support.

item.title: The Boys has overstayed its welcome
item.description: "The Boys" fifth and final season is the show's darkest, most dour outing yet. Review.

item.title: J’ai testé le Leica Q3, le compact plein format qui vous force à voir le monde autrement
item.description: Le Leica Q3 est un compact plein format à objectif fixe. 60 mégapixels, un Summilux 28 mm f/1,7 stabilisé, un autofocus hybride, la vidéo 8K. À 6 250 euros. C'est beaucoup. C'est même une somme déraisonnable pour beaucoup de photographes. On fait le point sur ses qualités mais aussi ses défauts.

item.title: OpenAI’s vision for the AI economy: public wealth funds, robot taxes, and a four-day work week
item.description: OpenAI proposes taxes on AI profits, public wealth funds, and expanded safety nets to address job loss and inequality, blending redistribution with capitalism as policymakers debate AI’s economic impact.

item.title: Iran threatens OpenAI’s Stargate data center in Abu Dhabi
item.description: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) has published a video threatening OpenAI's planned Abu Dhabi datacenter if the US follows through on threats to attack the country's power plants, as reported earlier by Tom's Hardware. The video, which was published to an Iranian state-backed news outlet's X account on April 3rd, says the IRGC will […]...

item.title: How to watch the historic Artemis II lunar flyby
item.description: NASA's Artemis II mission is about to make history. After a successful April 1 launch, and a trip of 39,000 miles through space, astronauts Reid Wiseman, Christina Koch, Victor Glover and Jeremy Hansen are about to travel farther from Earth than any human beings have before, and you can watch the entire thing unfold online. NASA will stream the entire flyby on YouTube and its own NASA+ website, with coverage beginning at 1PM ET. You can also watch NASA+ through Netflix. It's going to take some time for things to get underway, so if you're working or have plans this evening but don't want to m...

item.title: The Eufy E25 just hit a new record-low — get it for $400 off at Amazon
item.description: As of April 6, you can snag the Eufy E25 robot vacuum-mop combo for $599.99 at Amazon, down from $999.99.

item.title: The Artemis II astronauts will set a new distance record from Earth today
item.description: On April 15th, 1970, Jim Lovell, Fred Haise, and Jack Swigert set a distance record when Apollo 13 traveled 248,655 miles from Earth. Nearly 56 years later, the crew of Artemis II is expected to break that record by several thousand miles when the Orion spacecraft reaches a maximum distance of 252,757 miles away from […]

item.title: LA Has a Big Flea Problem. Typhus Cases Reached Record High Last Year
item.description: Cases of the serious bacterial disease reached a record high in the region last year. Here's how to avoid catching it.

item.title: The Nothing Ear (a) wireless earbuds are back at the lowest price ever — save over $50
item.description: The Nothing Ear (a) wireless earbuds are on sale at Amazon for $58.99, down from the normal price of $109. That's a 46% discount.

item.title: Cet écran PC QD-OLED MSI (240 Hz et 0,03 ms) est à prix cassé chez Darty
item.description: Envie d’un nouvel écran PC pour jouer à vos jeux préférés, sans pour autant exploser votre budget ? On a ce qu’il vous faut : cette référence MSI profite d’un écran QD-OLED ultra fluide de 27 pouces dont le prix passe de 529 euros à 399 euros.

item.title: Can a MacBook Neo handle everyday work? I tested it — and it’s very good news
item.description: The MacBook Neo is pitched as the budget laptop for everyone, but can it handle real work? We have your answer.

item.title: Ce constructeur chinois veut que ses voitures électriques soient parfaitement adaptées aux clients européens
item.description: La firme chinoise Zeekr confirme que ses voitures électriques vendues en Europe bénéficieront d’un système d’infodivertissement dédié. Basé sur Android Automotive, ce système est conçu spécialement pour répondre aux besoins des clients sur le Vieux Continent.

item.title: Logitech’s haptics-enhanced MX Master 4 mouse is on sale for under $100
item.description: If you’re shopping for a wireless mouse that’ll help you multitask more easily, Logitech’s MX Master 4 is easily one of the best and most comfortable options available. It’s rarely discounted, but the black version is currently down to $99.99 ($20 off) at Newegg with code TRWF233. While it offers similarly quiet clicks and long […]

item.title: The Sonos Ace noise-cancelling headphones are $100 cheaper today only
item.description: The Sonos Ace headphones are on sale for $100 off at Amazon, just $20 away from their best price ever.

item.title: Cisco CEO Chuck Robbins wants data centers in space
item.description: Today, I’m talking with Chuck Robbins, CEO of Cisco. Cisco is one of those big companies that everyone has heard of but that most of us don’t have to interact with very much; it’s not really a consumer brand. But all of us are in some way using Cisco’s products and services every day because […]

item.title: Mercedes-Benz recalls some G-Wagon EVs due to risk of wheels falling off
item.description: Before you take your electric G-Wagon for its next off-roading excursion, you may want to stop by an authorized dealer. The German automaker issued a recall for every Mercedes-Benz G580 with EQ technology with the 2025 model year, as first spotted by InsideEVs. According to the recall on the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration's website, the current wheel bolts could "allow a wheel to loosen or detach from the vehicle," potentially affecting 3,734 models on the road. The recall report explained that the electric G580's wheel bolts were "not adapted to the increased vehicle mass and ...

item.title: One of the largest corporate espionage and data breach scandals in digital history': New "BrowserGate" report claims LinkedIn secretly scans user browsers for installed extensions and collects device data
item.description: LinkedIn calls it a smear campaign, but does not deny scanning people's browsers for extensions.

item.title: Il n’y aura plus de jeux PlayStation sur PC, un changement discret le confirme
item.description: Sony a mis à jour les descriptions des studios PlayStation pour en effacer les mentions de "PC », confirmant l'arrêt des portages sur ordinateur.

item.title: ‘The Testaments’ Cast on How Their Show Mirrors Our Real-Life Dystopia
item.description: Similar to ‘The Handmaid’s Tale,’ the sequel series based on Margaret Atwood’s book has some uncomfortable parallels to current events.

item.title: Samsung's Music Studio speakers and two of its 2026 soundbars are available now
item.description: Back at CES, Samsung showed off a new line of speakers and two of its 2026 soundbars. Today, the company announced pricing for the entire suite of new products, including two soundbars that weren’t inside its showroom in Vegas. All but two of the new devices are available to order now, so you might not have to wait to get your hands on some new Samsung audio gear. Let’s start with the Music Studio 7 and Music Studio 5 speakers. The Music Studio 7 is the more rectangular model in the duo. It’s a 3.1.1-channel unit with left, right and center speakers alongside one woofer and one up-firing drive...
